meta.name: Default Workshop Tools
meta.description: Example tools for the agentic pipeline builder workshop. Includes A2UI interactive tools.

tools.name: a2ui_hello
tools.description: Returns an interactive A2UI card with a greeting message. Demonstrates how MCP tools can return rendered HTML UIs.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo. Returns ranked results with titles and snippets.

tools.name: fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch a web page and extract its readable text content.
